objective: Generalize live admission so admission is driven by manifest-rooted program contracts rather than hardcoded fixture assumptions. Validate admissibility via contract validation on monitoring_agent_v1 without re-admission.
forbidden_scope: do not re-admit monitoring_agent_v1 into live execution
do not modify generated monitoring_agent_v1 live admission entries from PHASE57
do not mutate registry, roadmap, queue, state, or manifest during ContractValidationOnly
runtime finalization may only complete the PHASE60 capability/task and clear active_task_id
do not modify generated program manifests
do not modify generated pack or task contracts
do not modify admission_status field to ADMITTED_TO_LIVE_EXECUTION
do not execute generated monitoring packs during PHASE60
do not claim generalized admission readiness beyond contract-validated fixtures
